response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed-systems expertise, with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and event-driven architectures. However, his experience lacks explicit executive leadership in fintech or regulated environments, and there is no clear track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or designing multi-agent AI systems in production at scale.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and backend expertise, including low-latency and real-time systems.
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and tooling (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows).
Diverse technical background with event-driven architectures and open-source contributions.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience in fintech or regulated environments.
Lacks demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems at scale.
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams or developing senior technical leadership.
